title: BNI and Bumi Siak Pusako Collaborate for Employee Retirement Solutions
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI is determined to always be present to provide financial solutions for workers in the country.

title: FAST seeks out loan to Gelael and Indoritel
body: PT Fast Food Indonesia Tbk (FAST), the management of fast food chain KFC, is seeking loan to its majority shareholders to anticipate capital deficiency during the expansion of KFC and Taco Bell outlets.

title: Free float requirement unmet, IDX suspends 4 issuers
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authorities temporarily suspends transactions of 4 issuers as they have failed to meet the minimum free float requirement of 7.5% of its shares.

title: Dian Siswarini to leave EXCL, stocks unaffected
body: PT XL Axiata Tbk (EXCL) shifted positively this morning (4/12) amid the news of Dian Siswarini’s resignation as President Director of EXCL circulating since yesterday (3/12).

title: IHSG strengthened in first session, tech sector weakened
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (IHSG) saw 1.49% climb, or 107.05 points higher, to 7,303.52, supported by nearly all sectors.

title: BNI and Bumi Siak Pusako Collaborate for Employee Retirement Solutions
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI is determined to always be present to provide financial solutions for workers in the country.

title: FAST seeks out loan to Gelael and Indoritel
body: PT Fast Food Indonesia Tbk (FAST), the management of fast food chain KFC, is seeking loan to its majority shareholders to anticipate capital deficiency during the expansion of KFC and Taco Bell outlets.

title: Free float requirement unmet, IDX suspends 4 issuers
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authorities temporarily suspends transactions of 4 issuers as they have failed to meet the minimum free float requirement of 7.5% of its shares.

title: Dian Siswarini to leave EXCL, stocks unaffected
body: PT XL Axiata Tbk (EXCL) shifted positively this morning (4/12) amid the news of Dian Siswarini’s resignation as President Director of EXCL circulating since yesterday (3/12).

title: IHSG strengthened in first session, tech sector weakened
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (IHSG) saw 1.49% climb, or 107.05 points higher, to 7,303.52, supported by nearly all sectors.

title: Increase in claims, insurance companies get bullish
body: The extensive amount of insurance claims that was recently announced brought upon positive effect on insurance industry, with public insurance companies recording jump in its price.

title: Indonesia to build methanol factory worth IDR 19.08 trillion next year
body: The Indonesian government will build a methanol factory with total investment worth IDR 19.08 trillion next year to cut down imports.

title: Blue-chip stocks saw inflows; The end of foreign outflows?
body: Foreign net buy recorded yesterday (3/12) finally ended the consecutive foreign outflows since the first week of November.

title: JCI rebounded 2.11% today, foreign net buy reached IDR 2.08 trillion
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) in trading today Tuesday (3/12) strengthened (rebounded) 2.11% or 149.03 points to the level of 7,196.02, after falling earlier this week.

title: Foreign transactions increase, net foreign volume surplus at 1.56 billion shares
body: On Tuesday, December 3, foreign investors upped their share purchasing and selling activity, with almost 6 billion shares bought and 4.43 billion shares sold. The net foreign volume then surplus and ended at 1.56 billion shares.

title: EMTK to conduct MESOP, price set to IDR 436
body: PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk (EMTK) is planning a private placement in regard to Management Employee Stock Option Plan (MESOP) program, valued at IDR 32.7 billion.

title: Controllers hold minimum portion, MEJA skyrocketed 179.79% since IPO
body: The stock performance of PT Harta Djaya Karya Tbk (MEJA) skyrocketed 179.79% since its debut on the stock exchange on February 12, 2024, until closing bell this Tuesday (3/12).

title: IDX reveals 5 issuers with highest transaction value
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) lists 5 issuers with highest transaction value in November 2024. As the name suggests, even the smallest transaction value reached IDR 13 trillion within 20 days.

title: Blue-chip weakened, IDX saw 5.36% drop in total market cap
body: Market capitalisation of Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) was reported shrinking by 5.36% in November 2024 from October 2024.

title: IHSG climbed 1.45% in the morning; know the leaders and the laggards
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (IHSG) showed 1.45% increase or 102.18 points higher to 7,149.17 at today’s (3/12) morning session, supported by price surges in nearly all sectors.

title: Bain Capital Credit to inject capital to SRAJ
body: Bain Capital Credit LP, through its affiliate, BCSS Maverick Holdings LP, plans to partake in a private placement and securities issuance of PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya Tbk (SRAJ) worth a total of USD 157 million.

title: Boosting growth, MPXL to expand to sea expedition services
body: PT MPX Logistics International Tbk (MPXL) will expand its logistics services to ocean freight services to drive revenue growth.

title: BNI Connects with Loyal Merchants through "BNI Wonderful Movie Day 2024"
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI continues to strive to be closer and become the main choice for loyal merchant partners in making transactions.

title: Eyeing IDR 1.03 trillion in IPO, Delta Giri Wacana to finally make its debut
body: PT Delta Giri Wacana Tbk (DGWG) will finally put its initial public offering (IPO) plan in motion by issuing 1.66 billion shares after having it mapped out since mid-last year.

title: AMRT entered Top Leaders, here’s how investors respond
body: PT Sumber Alfaria Trijaya Tbk (AMRT) attracts investors again after being listed under Top Leaders of IHSG last Monday (2/12).

title: Take a look at 5 stocks favoured by foreign investors this week
body: Foreign investors began to mass-collect several stocks of companies from various sectors, from energy to property, earlier this week (2/12).

title: Bank shares dominate Top Foreign Net Sell
body: A number of banking issuers dominated the Top Foreign Net Sell list in trading on Monday (2/12) today, due to the net selling volume by foreign investors (net foreign buy) which was higher than the net buying volume (net foreign buy).

title: Foreign selling volume hit 4 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at -640 million shares
body: Foreign investors began this month's foreign transactions by selling shares from 945 issuers on Monday, December 2, resulting in a total foreign sell volume of 4.03 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buy volume was only 3.39 billion shares, with net foreign volume closed at -640 million shares.

title: One year after IPO, SURI shares fell 70%
body: The share performance of PT Maja Agung Latexindo Tbk (SURI) has fallen 70% after its initial public offering in early December 2023. This note places this issuer in a row of weakly performing issuers this year.

title: Agus Projosasmito reveals factors behind BRMS performance surge
body: The performance of PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) soared in Q3 2024 compared to the same period in Q3 2023.

title: Stock split is near, Petrosea saw 9.51% jump today
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) saw 9.51% or 1,875-point increase at today’s morning session, arriving at IDR 21,600 per share.

title: BYAN saw 13.80% jump in market cap in November 2024
body: PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN) booked market capitalisation increase of 13.80% within the past month.

title: Reinforcing financing, BTPN to issue IDR 1.39 trillion bond
body: PT Bank SMBC Indonesia Tbk (BTPN) will offer Shelf-Registration Bond Phase II Year 2024 of IDR 1.39 trillion next week (11-12/12).

title: BRMS seeks loan for underground mine in Palu
body: PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) is looking for a loan facility to fund the underground mine construction in Palu, Central Sulawesi.

title: Supporting Financial Inclusion and Sustainable Economy, BNI Involves People with Disabilities in Agen46 Program
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BNI) continues to demonstrate its commitment to supporting financial inclusion and encouraging a sustainable economy.

title: Mining companies overthrew IHSG’s growth last week
body: Some of mining companies toppled Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index’s (IHSG) growth last week, only arriving at 7,114.26 or slipping 1.13% or 81.29 points lower from the week prior.

title: Stock price plummeted 44.53%, ADRO drove investors away
body: The stock price of PT Alamtri Resources Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) saw significant decline of up to 44.53% within the past week, further driving the offloading trend from foreign investors.

title: Post-IPO, BOAT is foreign investors’ favourite
body: Foreign investors mass-collect PT Newport Marine Services Tbk’s (BOAT) shares after this oil and gas industry service provider debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Samuel Tumbuh Bersama invests 3.37 billion shares in Nusantara Sawit (NSSS)
body: On Thursday, November 28, PT Samuel Tumbuh Bersama boosted its stake in PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS) in an amazing number after adding shares in very minor sums on the previous trading days. This investor now owns nearly 40% of the issuer's shares in the palm oil industry after purchasing 3.37 billion shares through PT Ciptadana Sekuritas Asia.

title: Introducing New Concept, BNI Emerald Center Serves Premium Customers
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI, continues to transform to get closer to its loyal customers. One of the strategic steps is through the renewal of the BNI Emerald Center, now present with a new design and concept that is more modern and comfortable.
